children.name:
Message: unexpected HTTP error: 500 Internal Server Error, {"status":"fail","message":"Locking failed for [10.80.0.50]:5701, tx: 025d02eb-20a3-44c9-968e-f4622e7f3322, current state: ClusterStateManager{stateLockRef=LockGuard{lockOwner=[10.80.1.53]:5701, lockOwnerId='24a3e86e-f51f-4aa0-bb3c-2367613bc76c', lockExpiryTime=1658494792691}, state=ACTIVE}"}
Expected
    <v1alpha1.HotBackupState>: Failure
not to equal
    <v1alpha1.HotBackupState>: Failure
[It] Hazelcast CR with Persistence feature enabled should trigger ForceStart when restart from HotBackup failed [hz_persistence, slow]

Message: unexpected HTTP error: 500 Internal Server Error, {"status":"fail","message":"Locking failed for [10.80.0.60]:5701, tx: 3d7dbb12-6e2c-4540-93d7-521623395556, current state: ClusterStateManager{stateLockRef=LockGuard{lockOwner=[10.80.0.60]:5701, lockOwnerId='b0755050-4d97-4047-bd17-e35e811168c3', lockExpiryTime=1658495146163}, state=ACTIVE}"}
Expected
    <v1alpha1.HotBackupState>: Failure
not to equal

[It] Hazelcast CR with Persistence feature enabled Should successfully restore from external backup using Azure bucket [hz_persistence, slow]
